title: DiscordBridge Velocity
description: Stable, modern, and fully customizable connection between your Velocity proxy and Discord
body: # ⭐ DiscordBridgeVelocity — The Ultimate Bridge Between Discord & Velocity ⭐ **DiscordBridgeVelocity** is the perfect plugin for creating a **stable, modern, and fully customizable** connection between your Velocity proxy and Discord. Easily link your Minecraft network with a powerful Discord bot, enabling account linking, chat synchronization, role syncing, and much more. ✔️ **Velocity** proxy ✔️ Optional **LuckPerms** integration ✔️ Optional **Litebans** integration ✔️ Optional **VelocityUtils** integration --- ## 🔗 Key Features ### 🤖 Fully Configurable Discord Bot - Customize bot **status**, **activity**, **description**, and more. - Admin commands available directly from Discord. --- ### 🔐 Minecraft ↔ Discord Account Linking Let your players verify their identity with ease. - Simple linking command for players. - Secure, fast, and easy to use. - Fully customizable messages. **Benefits of account linking:** - Ensures true identity between Discord and Minecraft. - Allows role syncing with LuckPerms integration. - Enables restricted channels or features for verified users only. --- ### 🛡️ Automatic Role Sync (LuckPerms) If you use **LuckPerms**, the plugin becomes even more powerful: - Sync Minecraft groups to Discord roles. - Roles update automatically when a player’s rank changes. - Keeps your Discord roles always accurate and organized. --- ### 💬 Discord ↔ Minecraft Chat Bridge Players can communicate from anywhere. - Messages from **Discord to Minecraft**. - Fully customizable formatting. Perfect for global chat, staff chat, or community channels. --- ### ⚙️ Additional Features - Modular system for Velocity. - Clean, easy-to-read configuration files. --- ## 🧪 Requirements - Java 17+ - Velocity proxy - Discord bot token - LuckPerms (optional for role sync) - Litebans (optional for ban sync) - VelocityUtils (optional for enhanced features) --- ## 📦 Installation 1. Place **DiscordBridgeVelocity.jar** in your Velocity `/plugins` folder. 2. Restart your proxy. 3. Configure your bot in `config.yml`. 4. Use `/discordbridge reload` and enjoy the full integration! --- ## 💬 Need Help or Support? 📖 Wiki: https://rexi666-plugins.gitbook.io/rexi666/discord-bridge-velocity Join my Discord server (Spanish/English):
